response.justification: The candidate brings 19+ years of full-stack development with 9+ years at senior/staff level, directly matching the primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes) across recent roles. Critically, current work explicitly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework development, directly addressing a key required skill. Staff-level seniority exceeds the mid-senior requirement, and proven track record includes micro-services architecture at scale. Minor gaps include specific framework names (Nest.js, Vitest) not explicitly mentioned, though equivalent deep experience is evident.
strengths: 19+ years full-stack experience with 9+ years at senior/staff level, directly exceeding seniority requirements
Current AI-agent infrastructure work and MCP framework development directly addresses the key 'AI agent development' requirement
Complete primary tech stack demonstrated: TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes across recent roles
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned despite extensive Node.js framework experience across multiple roles
Specific testing tools (Vitest, Playwright) not called out despite clear testing expertise and workshop leadership
Security, authentication, and authorization best practices not explicitly highlighted in resume

key_factors.factor: Current AI-agent and MCP infrastructure expertise
Staff-level seniority with proven scaling experience
